programme.title: Lies, Damn Lies and Statistics
programme.desc: Everyone waits anxiously for the results of a poll to tell them if their new, activist policies are moving them in the right direction. C.J. feels like her opinions are being discounted.

programme.title: Road To San Remo
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Gussie Smith hires the Rangers to take her from Laredo to San Remo. Joe is worried, as he believes an attempt was made on Gussie's life.

programme.desc: The Rangers are tasked with finding out who has been raiding settlements, kidnapping skilled workers and killing the rest. What they find defies history!

programme.desc: Three winners return to compete in the frightful finale. Who will make the ultimate haunted house out of gingerbread & win the $25,000 prize?

programme.title: I Can't Believe It's Not Butter
programme.desc: The bakers recreate items found in the dairy aisle and design realistic canned goods out of cake.

programme.title: Game Day BBQ
programme.desc: The teams are celebrating a classic BBQ tradition: Tailgating! We explore the sporty side of BBQ the kind that brings family together around the grill.

programme.title: Pinata Cakes
programme.desc: It's a challenge that is chock full of surprises, as two husband and wife teams create exciting Pinata Cakes.

programme.title: Time to Pull the Curtain on Crepes
programme.desc: Sweet or savoury, Bobby loves crepes for brunch. He's making smoked salmon, ricotta and caper crepes topped with a herb sauce, as well as ham-cheesy-egg crepes.

programme.title: The Battle Begins
programme.desc: Valastro and Duff Goldman compete with family recipes and car-inspired birthday cakes.

programme.title: Spring Bunnies and Chickens, Oh My!
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to create beautiful edible eggs with a surprise flavour and decorative spring chick.

programme.title: Spring Romance
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan pairs up the bakers to create a proposal dessert plate for a spring couple. Next, each baker makes half the cake without seeing their teammate's work!

programme.title: Mango Tango
programme.desc: Bakers and fakers try not to crumble when using mangoes in their coffee cakes, and then they use tomatoes in multiple forms in their desserts.

programme.title: Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Tony goes to Sri Lanka, exploring the cuisine, which is influenced by Portuguese, Dutch, British, Indian, Arab, Malay and Moor traders. He visits a culinary school built after the 2004 tsunami.

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sharon and Steve help Tony find a place he can retire to, with space for his five grandchildren. In Alicante, Linda and Manuel help Irish house-hunters David and Marion.

programme.title: Scottish Lighthouse
programme.desc: Duncan and his fiance June have grand plans to transform one of the most iconic landmarks on the Clyde, Cloch Lighthouse, into a state-of-the-art party home.

programme.title: Ford Cortina GT and Saab 96
programme.desc: Paul and Drew head to Oxfordshire to check out a Saab 96 with a two-stroke engine. Will the duo splash out on this memorable vehicle?

programme.title: Jalisco
programme.desc: Eva Longoria visits Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially 'Mexican' originated. She discovers that the Guadalajara has some of the best restaurants.

programme.title: The Battle Begins
programme.desc: Valastro and Duff Goldman compete with family recipes and car-inspired birthday cakes.

programme.title: Spring Bunnies and Chickens, Oh My!
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to create beautiful edible eggs with a surprise flavour and decorative spring chick.

programme.title: Baby Commercial / Little Dude
programme.desc: Phil and Lil star in a diaper commercial and do anything but stick to the script. / Didi brings Tommy to the school where she teaches, and he becomes the coolest baby in class.

programme.title: The Old Catdog and the Sea / Cat Gone Bad
programme.desc: This is a salty old fisherman's tale about the Swordfish on CatDog's living-room wall. / Cat suffers an identity crisis when a gang of alley-cats set up shop near the CatDog house.

programme.title: Camped!
programme.desc: When Dad discovers that his childhood camp is closing, he decides to take the family for one final visit.

programme.title: The Talk
programme.desc: The Crimson Lord uses a Shard-embedded megaphone to steal voices, including L.J.'s! Mute before she's in the suit, to do incantations, Jade plays videos of herself training in the Kwoon.

programme.title: Spaceflu
programme.desc: The Galactic Agency's spaceship, Toaster, is under attack. An 'electrovorous' virus is devouring its circuits, and it's heading straight for Electric City unless our heroes can regain control.

programme.title: Don't Cry Felicia
programme.desc: Planet Scubadome needs saving. Shaped like a gigantic aquarium, the inhabitants are at risk from rising water caused by Felicia, a giant octopus who has been crying up a storm.

programme.title: The Wasteland Warrior
programme.desc: In a brutal wasteland, Raph and Donnie fend off deadly gangs while a strange girl points the way to the Impossible Desert - and the brother they thought lost.

programme.title: Backyard Ballet
programme.desc: Leah and Zac want to re-enact their new favourite ballet, Swan Lake. Leah wishes to be a ballerina like the Swan Queen, but the genies make her a queen of real swans!

programme.title: Episode 79
programme.desc: Join Lucia and Tsehay as they build a little cubby out of blankets and chairs, then hear a story all about a prince who wishes to be in a rock and roll band!

programme.title: Episode 80
programme.desc: Learn all about the beautiful culture of Greece with Lucia! From nursery rhymes and Greek food to exploring a Greek school with Buddy, there's plenty to discover.

programme.title: Pups Save a Bat/ Pups Save a Toof
programme.desc: The pups need to quietly rescue a baby Bat which is taking a nap hanging from the Town Hall bell. When Alex has to go to the dentist, the PAW Patrol works together to help him face his fears.

programme.title: Pizza Delivery / Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob and Squidward to make the first successful pizza delivery. / SpongeBob faces an infestation of pesky parasites threatening his beloved pineapple home!

programme.title: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy / Pickles
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick meet their TV heroes but find they're not what they expected. / SpongeBob's confidence takes a hit when an arrogant customer complains he forgot the pickles on a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Episode 1
programme.desc: Today on Kea Kids News: Rubber duckies take flight! A Rainbow Parade! Pies out of mud?! A Manu Champion is made!

programme.title: Boss of My Own Body
programme.desc: Although children are "just little" and "not the boss of many things", their body is something that they will always be in control of - nobody else can be the boss of that.

programme.title: Pups Save the Camping Trip/ Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
programme.desc: On a camping trip, Chickaletta falls down a crevice and needs the pups' help to get out. Tons of baby turtles are popping up all over town and must be rounded up and safely returned to their pond.

programme.title: The Big Trick
programme.desc: It's April Fools' Day and tricky Rat sets out to prove he's the trickiest trickster of all.

programme.title: The Music Box
programme.desc: The Bananas give Lulu a music box but it breaks down and so they have to find a way to fix it.

programme.title: No Way, Souffle!/ Cinnamon the Elephant!
programme.desc: Cricket's noisy ways keep ruining the souffle for the Brookbinders' anniversary. / A shy little girl is having trouble making friends.

programme.desc: Learn all about the beautiful culture of Greece with Lucia! From nursery rhymes and Greek food to exploring a Greek school with Buddy, there's plenty to discover.

programme.title: Baby Commercial / Little Dude
programme.desc: Phil and Lil star in a diaper commercial and do anything but stick to the script. / Didi brings Tommy to the school where she teaches, and he becomes the coolest baby in class.

programme.title: Pizza Delivery / Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob and Squidward to make the first successful pizza delivery. / SpongeBob faces an infestation of pesky parasites threatening his beloved pineapple home!

programme.title: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy / Pickles
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick meet their TV heroes but find they're not what they expected. / SpongeBob's confidence takes a hit when an arrogant customer complains he forgot the pickles on a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: The Talk
programme.desc: The Crimson Lord uses a Shard-embedded megaphone to steal voices, including L.J.'s! Mute before she's in the suit, to do incantations, Jade plays videos of herself training in the Kwoon.

programme.title: Back Out There / Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde tries to cheer Lincoln up and cure his post-breakup blues. / Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Weird World of Wyrm
programme.desc: While exploring a wrecked ship, the Turtles, April, Casey, and Fugitoid uncover a hypercube housing Wyrm, a creature who offers three wishes that may change everything.

programme.title: The Outlaw Armaggon
programme.desc: When Lord Dregg hires a fearsome bounty hunter, the shark mutant Armaggon, to destroy the Turtles, the team flees to an abandoned space station.

programme.title: The Awakening
programme.desc: Believed to be dead, Aang conceals his identity on a stolen Fire Navy ship for the impending invasion. As Azula and Zuko celebrate false victory, Aang grapples with redemption.

programme.title: Chuckie's First Haircut / Cool Hand Angelica
programme.desc: Chuckie faces his fear of haircuts with a little help from friends and family. / Angelica thinks camp is beneath her, that is, until she's forced to try it.

programme.title: The Tricycle Thief / Rhinoceritis!
programme.desc: Angelica gets blamed for stealing a tricycle, but the truth isn't what it seems. / Chuckie panics when Angelica's made-up "Rhinoceritis" threatens to turn him into a rhino.

programme.title: Pups Save the Camping Trip/ Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
programme.desc: On a camping trip, Chickaletta falls down a crevice and needs the pups' help to get out. Tons of baby turtles are popping up all over town and must be rounded up and safely returned to their pond.

programme.title: The Fastest of Them All
programme.desc: When a greedy queen casts a spell to make a few of our friends go slow, Blaze and AJ must race her for the magical cure.

programme.title: Baddy Up to No Good / Rooster Brewster
programme.desc: Baddy McBat plots to win a good-deeds trophy by causing problems so he can swoop in to the rescue. The Cadets accidentally lose Rod's favourite toy and race the clock to get it back before he returns.

programme.title: Meet Josh
programme.desc: Something is missing from Blue's snack. We play Blue's Clues with our new host Josh, and a little help from our old friends, Steve and Joe, to find out what it is.

programme.title: E Noho & E Tu (Sit & Stand)
programme.desc: After Katie freezes up, Whaea Kaz tries an unorthodox approach, and suddenly it clicks. Just as her confidence grows, Katie learns her final test will be performed in front of friends and whanau.

programme.title: Moa's Egg
programme.desc: Moa's chick is reluctant to emerge from her egg, so Kiri sings an encouraging song.

programme.title: Biggest Fight Ever
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou have a big fight, but they find it's too hard not to be friends.

programme.title: Body Song
programme.desc: Kiri sings a song about how wonderful it is to have your very own body.

programme.title: Gaucho Games/ Princesa Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help their friend Catalina the Condor become an amazing Gaucha and save the Gaucho Games! Pilar the Princess Unicorn teams up with Dora and Boots to return to Unicorn Land.

programme.title: The Jelly Planet
programme.desc: The Bananas' dream of travelling in a rocket ship and exploring outer space almost comes true.

programme.title: Rat's Movie Night
programme.desc: When Rat organises a movie night for the town, the Bananas and Teddies combine to make a film - but the result is not what they were hoping for.

programme.title: The Marmalady Sisters!/ Butterbean's is Closing!
programme.desc: Ms. Marmalady and her sister enter the Siblings Day Baking Contest. / Cricket overhears Butterbean mention she's closing the cafe!

programme.title: Pups and the Beanstalk/ Pups Save the Turbots
programme.desc: Rubble dreams Alex is a giant causing trouble, and the pups must help him back up the beanstalk. Then, Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois get stuck on a cliff while trying to photograph a rare bird.

programme.title: Pups and the Lighthouse Boogie/ Pups Save Ryder
programme.desc: While trying to get a closer look at a baby whale in the bay, Mayor Goodway and Alex's rowboat starts drifting out to sea with a storm coming. Ryder and Garby the goat get stuck on a cliff edge.

programme.title: Dodo Egg Scramble/ Trini's Trin-Tastic Big Swirl Tour
programme.desc: The Cadets come to the rescue when dodo eggs, soon to be Della's little brothers and sisters, get washed away. Baddy's tour of Big Swirl's most dangerous areas lands Trini and him in trouble.

programme.title: Hall Monitor / Jellyfish Jam
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff names SpongeBob this week's Hall Monitor. / Despite his friends' warnings, SpongeBob brings home a wild jellyfish.

programme.title: Its Power Is Strong
programme.desc: Jake learns the truth about Cara's selkie nature and resolves to return the skin to the cave. But will he be able to resist the skin's enchantment to set Cara free?

programme.title: Dad Reputation / Dream a Lily Dream
programme.desc: While playing in her Dad's new band, Luna is concerned this will harm her reputation. / Lisa discovers the only way to stop Lily's nightmares is to go inside her dreams and fight them herself.

programme.title: The Impossible Desert
programme.desc: As they roam the desert wasteland, the team searches for a mysterious hermit, who is the key to finding the mythical Oasis.

programme.title: Eye Of The Tiger
programme.desc: Newsflash: Jade Armor stole the Golden Dragon! L.J. is appalled. Who is the imposter making her look bad? It's Black Tiger - a notorious Creature Collector.

programme.title: The Old Catdog and the Sea / Cat Gone Bad
programme.desc: This is a salty old fisherman's tale about the Swordfish on CatDog's living-room wall. / Cat suffers an identity crisis when a gang of alley-cats set up shop near the CatDog house.

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: Leah and Zac have been saving for months to get the big prize at the arcade, but the ticket counting machine malfunctions and ruins all of their tickets.

programme.title: Dance With The Tree Of Wisdom
programme.desc: Let's dance with The Tree of Wisdom, shake our arms, Wiggle like no one's watching, and learn some new moves along the way!

programme.title: Piggyback Dash
programme.desc: The little Reefies team up to compete in their ocean-famous piggyback race. Even Mr Flip joins in, but the race to the finish line turns unexpectedly fishy!

programme.title: An Amazing Morning
programme.desc: Oleander's family are flummoxed when they find a maze in their yard. As they search for answers, they get lost inside!

programme.title: Gods And Zombie Flowers
programme.desc: Convinced the makutu is the work of the Ponaturi, Toro and Hikuroa head off. Unfortunately, they don't hear Josh tell them about the creature he saw in the puna. S2 Ep5

programme.title: Flying Man
programme.desc: Reretoa towers over the group and commands them to restore the balance. S2 Ep6

programme.title: Sandy's Rocket / Squeaky Boots

programme.desc: Tommy is entered in a baby girl beauty pageant, but can his disguise fool his fiercest rival? / Stu and Grandpa take Tommy to a baseball game, but he's more interested in finding his balloon.

programme.desc: Ever since he was a puppy, Dog has chased the venerable city garbage truck, fondly known as "Old 159". / Dog has to wear a cone on his head in order to protect the tick bite on his ear.

programme.title: Fool's Paradise / Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With Luan away at camp, the Louds think they are safe from April Fool's Day pranks. / The kids discover Dad doesn't work at his old job anymore and blame themselves, scrambling to find him a new one.

programme.title: Riddle of the Ancient Aeons
programme.desc: The Turtles race through an ancient alien temple for a black hole fragment, but instead uncover the Soul Star, an artefact that marks the Aeons and holds the key to their planet's salvation.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of Mikey's Mind
programme.desc: When microscopic aliens invade Mikey's mind, the Turtles are forced into a surreal journey through his subconscious to save him.

programme.title: The Headband
programme.desc: Mistaken for a student, Aang slips into Fire Nation school life, uncovering the distorted history being taught. As he adapts to fit in, Zuko's growing paranoia sets a deadly plan in motion.

programme.title: Firedog / Dog Show
programme.desc: The tempting smell of fish chilli leads CatDog into a firehouse, where a sudden blaze gives them a shot at glory. / CatDog go undercover at a dog show, chasing the grand prize: a trip to Tropicali!

programme.title: Sumo Enchanted Evening / Hotel Catdog
programme.desc: From buffet binging to sumo brawls, CatDog take on Rancid Rabbit in a feast gone wild. / CatDog turn their home into a luxury hotel, bringing big guests and even bigger messes.

programme.title: Pups and the Lighthouse Boogie/ Pups Save Ryder
programme.desc: While trying to get a closer look at a baby whale in the bay, Mayor Goodway and Alex's rowboat starts drifting out to sea with a storm coming. Ryder and Garby the goat get stuck on a cliff edge.

programme.title: Snow Rescue Blaze
programme.desc: When a big ski mishap gets Crusher and Pickle stuck super far away, Blaze and AJ will perform a daring snow rescue to save the day.

programme.title: Penny Rescues the Aqua Wing/ Bananas Away
programme.desc: When Rocco and Chomps race off in Penny's Aqua-Wing, she chases after them in Chomps's sub. The search is on for Sandy Stork's plane full of party treats that the Banana Bandits have taken.

programme.title: Happy Birthday Blue
programme.desc: It's Blue's birthday! We play Blue's Clues to figure out what present Blue wants for her birthday. While we look for Clues, we help Josh get ready for the party.

programme.title: The Wiggly Days of the Week
programme.desc: Join Evie and Dorothy for some graceful 'Row, Row, Row Your Boat Ballet'. Then embark on a week-long journey to explore the days of the week.

programme.title: Doing a Handstand
programme.desc: Get ready for a Wiggly circus! Join in the fun with the 'Doing a Handstand' sing-along, and you can dance too! We're delighted to welcome Atsuko Arai, singing the beautiful song 'Haru Ga Kita.

programme.title: Amazing Ears
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou want to meet Dalvanius, a creature who is very good at camouflaging. Dalvanius says he'll only reveal himself if they promise not to laugh at his ears.

programme.title: Side-Swiped/ Quest for the Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots must get home before Swiper and his nephew Zorrito swipe their teddy bear. Boots' cousin, Sombrera, journeys across the rainforest with Dora to find the special blue bananas.

programme.title: Bad Luck Morgan
programme.desc: Morgan thinks he only has bad luck, and the Bananas try to persuade him that this isn't true.

programme.title: The Waterhole
programme.desc: After they accidentally damage the turtles' waterhole, the Bananas have to try and repair it quick smart.

programme.title: The Big Tomato!/ Tough Customers!
programme.desc: Poppy nurtures a massive tomato, hoping to impress Chef Carlo. / The Bean Team are having trouble getting an order right for a tough customer.

programme.title: Pups Great Race/ Pups Take the Cake
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Race Day, and the pups get to race across town to see who's the fastest. Mr. Porter enters a cake competition and needs the pups' help to bake the biggest, tastiest cake.

programme.title: Pups and the Pirate Treasure
programme.desc: After stumbling into a secret pirate hideout, Cap'n Turbot is rescued by the PAW Patrol. The pups then discover an incomplete treasure map, clues to the missing pieces, and a sunken pirate treasure.

programme.title: Baddy and the Bad Wings/ Cheep and Chirp's Splashy Surf Show
programme.desc: Baddy forms the Bad-Wings, and they hijack the Command Flyer so he can take over Big Swirl! Davey Hasselhawg teaches Cheep, Chirp, and their friends wakeboard tricks while Brody is busy with a rescue.

programme.title: Nature Pants / Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob leaves the industrial grind behind to live freely among the jellyfish. / Fed up with SpongeBob and Patrick's antics, Squidward decides it's time to move.

programme.title: Where's Ted?
programme.desc: Ted is gravely ill and missing. Jake and Jessie will need to muster up all their smarts to find him. Cara makes a desperate play to get her skin back.

programme.title: How the Best Was Won / Animal House
programme.desc: The gang splits up, competing for the title of "Middle School's Best Friends". / Lana struggles to find homes for the exotic pets at the Royal Woods Animal Shelter, before they're moved out.

programme.title: Carmaggedon!
programme.desc: Raph must fight the leaders of the road warrior clans to gain their loyalty, before they face their biggest enemy yet on their way to Oasis.

programme.title: Rogue Beasticon
programme.desc: Since breaking away from the Crimson Lord, Xinyan hates humans. When he gets his paws on a Shard that brings out people's animal natures, he wants to make Ban Tang into a Human Zoo.

programme.title: The Ballad of Ol' 159 / Cone Dog
programme.desc: Ever since he was a puppy, Dog has chased the venerable city garbage truck, fondly known as "Old 159". / Dog has to wear a cone on his head in order to protect the tick bite on his ear.

programme.title: Santa's Little Genies
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve, and Leah is transported to the North Pole! After Leah accidentally wishes Santa to a tropical island, it's up to the girls to save Christmas!

programme.title: Writing A Poem With Evie
programme.desc: Join Evie Wiggle as she writes a poem! With each Wiggle asking for her help to remember something, Evie makes a helpful poem, showing that inspiration can come from anywhere!

programme.title: Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: It's Mr Flip's birthday! Ms Flouncy and the Reefies are planning the ultimate surprise party for their teacher, but Oli gets her tentacles in a twist wanting everything to go perfectly.

programme.title: Reefie Rockstars
programme.desc: When popular music group, The Sea Lions, cancel their visit to Reef School, the Reefies decide to put on their own concert, but Jaws the jawfish finds it hard to share the spotlight.

programme.title: First Sleepover
programme.desc: Surg the surgeonfish is excited for her first ever sleepover! While she loves the noisy chaos of the clownfish twins' household, the sleepover makes her value the simple quiet of her own home.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou have a wild adventure delivering a giant fruit to Pania.

programme.title: Meteors
programme.desc: While Lou warns everyone that meteorites are falling, Small does her exercises.

programme.title: Best Party Ever
programme.desc: Massimo's birthday has Oleander impetuously inviting everyone and tweaking every detail, just as the cake arrives, she learns what truly makes the day special.

programme.title: Culture Shock / F.U.N.
